sql.if: AND ( A.NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(A.NTC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(A.NTC_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(NTC_NO), 0) + 1 FROM NOTICE
INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NTC_NO, NTC_DEPT_CD, EMP_ID, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_STTS, NTC_DT, NTC_CNT, FILE_ID, NTC_DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{ntcNo}, #{ntcDeptCd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ntcTtl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ntcCn, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{ntcStts, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, 0, #{fileId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, 'N' )
mapper.select:
SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.NTC_STTS IN ('중요', '긴급') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, A.NTC_NO DESC) RNUM , A.NTC_NO, A.NTC_TTL, A.NTC_DT, A.NTC_CNT, A.FILE_ID, A.NTC_STTS, A.NTC_DEPT_CD, A.NTC_CN , B.EMP_NM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_DETAIL FD WHERE FD.FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID) AS FILE_COUNT , (SELECT LISTAGG(FD.FILE_DTL_O_NM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY FD.FILE_DTL_ID) FROM FILE_DETAIL FD WHERE FD.FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID) AS FILE_NAMES /* [추가] 파일 상세 정보 컬럼 (ResultMap의 collection을 채우기 위함) */ , FD.FILE_DTL_ID , FD.FILE_DTL_O_NM FROM NOTICE A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON(A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID) /* [추가] 파일 상세 테이블 조인 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON(A.FILE_ID = FD.FILE_ID) WHERE A.NTC_DEL_YN = 'N'
) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON(A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID) WHERE A.NTC_DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT A.NTC_NO, A.NTC_TTL, A.NTC_CN, A.NTC_DT, A.NTC_CNT, A.NTC_STTS, A.EMP_ID, A.FILE_ID, A.EMP_NM, A.PREV_NO, A.PREV_TTL, A.NEXT_NO, A.NEXT_TTL, FD.FILE_DTL_ID, FD.FILE_DTL_O_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_PATH, FD.FILE_DTL_EXT, CASE WHEN A.FILE_ID > 0 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID) ELSE 0 END AS FILE_COUNT, CASE WHEN A.FILE_ID > 0 THEN (SELECT LISTAGG(FILE_DTL_O_NM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY FILE_DTL_ID) FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID GROUP BY FILE_ID) ELSE NULL END AS FILE_NAMES FROM ( SELECT N.NTC_NO, N.NTC_TTL, N.NTC_CN, N.NTC_DT, N.NTC_CNT, N.NTC_STTS, N.EMP_ID, N.FILE_ID, E.EMP_NM, LAG(N.NTC_NO) OVER (ORDER BY N.NTC_NO ASC) AS PREV_NO, LAG(N.NTC_TTL) OVER (ORDER BY N.NTC_NO ASC) AS PREV_TTL, LEAD(N.NTC_NO) OVER (ORDER BY N.NTC_NO ASC) AS NEXT_NO, LEAD(N.NTC_TTL) OVER (ORDER BY N.NTC_NO ASC) AS NEXT_TTL FROM NOTICE N LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON (N.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID) WHERE N.NTC_DEL_YN = 'N' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON (A.FILE_ID = FD.FILE_ID AND A.FILE_ID > 0) WHERE A.NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NTC_DEL_YN = 'Y', NTC_DEL_DT = SYSDATE WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_DT, NTC_CNT, NTC_STTS, EMP_ID FROM NOTICE WHERE NTC_STTS = '긴급' AND NTC_DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY NTC_DT DESC, NTC_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
